title: Heading/project overview area for boards
excerpt: I would love to be able to add documents, instructions or additional information in an organised way to the top of a board. For example, my project might have 1 specification document that goes across the whole thing, so…

posts.author: Rachel (Rachel Owen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to be able to add documents, instructions or additional information in an organised way to the top of a board. For example, my project might have 1 specification document that goes across the whole thing, so rather than having this linked in a pulse (which then could create duplication) just have the spec document sitting in the top board description area.

Alternatively, the ability to have just the top group with a different set of columns to the other groups - then you could have a high level group at the top with dates, files etc without introducing unecessary columns to the rest of the groups.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed.

There are a couple of similar feature requests regarding the tops of the boards (Description area etc), posted months ago in these forums, which are awaiting some love from Monday.com.

https://community.monday.com/t/robust-board-description-field-support-for-html-and-or-hyperlinks/7442

Collapse Board Description Feature requests
I’ve searched through many topics here regarding the use of the Board Description area that is immediately under the Board Title. However, I can’t see anywhere that the following issue is mentioned. If this is a duplicate, I apologise. We have a number of boards that include some extensive text descriptions. Some of these descriptions are truncated and display the “Read More” button. The “Read More” button works well for these instances. However, could we please have a corresponding “Colla…
Column Description, Note, or Tooltip Feature requests
The screenshot below is of a board I’m using to track dates and thresholds for performance reports that my team creates for different project types in our homeless services Continuum of Care. Each column represents one project type. I use the info boxes in each Goal’s pulse to put information about calculating that goal, but I would love a way to enter information about an entire column. In the PSH-OPH column, I would like to be able to put a note that explains that we have one agency that want…

Feel free to add your vote.

posts.author: Rachel (Rachel Owen)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, thank you! I knew it was something I had seen before, but my searches yesterday didn’t bring up any exactly like I wanted. Thanks for linking!
